contextLoading.description: Does it load product.json, content-guide.md, tokens, components, and layout-patterns.json?

scoring.10: All available context loaded and referenced throughout the pipeline
scoring.7: Most context loaded, minor data not utilized
scoring.4: Tokens and components loaded but product context ignored
scoring.1: Minimal context loading, operates from brief alone

planArchetypeMatch.description: Does the plan match an appropriate layout archetype from layout-patterns.json?

scoring.10: Correct archetype selected with clear rationale, adapted to brief specifics
scoring.7: Reasonable archetype selected, minor mismatch with brief
scoring.4: Generic layout that doesn't match any archetype
scoring.1: Wrong archetype (e.g., card grid for a data table brief)

componentCoverage.description: Does Gate 1 pass? Library components / total UI elements >= 75%?

scoring.4: 50-75% coverage, gate fails but proceeds with note

buildExecution.description: Does Gate 2 pass? 5/5 build validation checks (coverage, text, properties, tokens, visual)?

scoring.10: All 5 checks pass on first attempt
scoring.1: Build fails or produces broken output

stateGeneration.description: Does Gate 3 pass? At least 3 of 4 states generated with product-specific content?

scoring.10: All 4 states generated with product-specific content (no generic empty states)
scoring.1: No states generated, only primary frame

auditRigor.description: Does the audit score all 9 dimensions with evidence? Does Gate 4 pass (>= 7.0)?

scoring.10: All 9 dimensions scored with specific evidence, overall >= 8.0
scoring.1: Perfunctory audit with no evidence, or audit skipped

stressTestCoverage.description: Does the stress test cover overflow, empty, error, and boundary cases? Grade >= B?

scoring.10: All categories tested, specific failures identified with remediation notes, grade A
scoring.4: Only text overflow tested, grade C
scoring.1: Minimal testing or stress test skipped, grade D or F

contentQuality.description: Does all text content use product terminology, content-guide.md voice, and real data?

scoring.10: Every text element uses product terminology, voice matches content-guide, zero placeholders
scoring.7: Most text is product-specific, 1-2 generic items
scoring.4: Mix of product-specific and generic/placeholder text
scoring.1: Placeholder text throughout (Lorem ipsum, Olivia Rhye, generic labels)

handoffCompleteness.description: Does Phase 8 produce annotations with token names, interaction states, and a summary comment?

scoring.10: Full annotations on frame, comment posted with states and specs, workflow log complete
scoring.7: Annotations and comment present, minor gaps in coverage
scoring.4: Partial annotations, no Figma comment posted

workflowLogIntegrity.description: Is workflow-log.md complete with all gate results, node IDs, and summary table?

scoring.10: Every phase logged with gate results, node IDs, and final summary table
scoring.7: Most phases logged, minor gaps in detail
scoring.4: Partial log, missing gate results or node references
